rulings.Case Title: BUSH -GRANT LLC VS. HOTEL ASTORIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing And Motion For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 4, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT HOTEL ASTORIA, INC.'S Notice Of Hearing And Motion For New Trial is DENIED. The only issue before the Court in this unlawful detainer action is holding over by commercial tenant upon expiration of the fixed term commercial lease/sub-lease. Moving party shifted its burden and provided evidence regarding the existence and expiration of the lease/sub-lease and defendant holding over. Defendant failed to present competent evidence to create a triable issue of fact regarding the issue of possession. Therefore no grounds for granting a motion for a new trial per CCP 657 exist. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITYWIDE PROPERTRIES, INC. VS. KRISTEN SKALIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 4, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CHAPPELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. The "Amended Notice" was served on May 11, 2015 while the underlying motion was under submission. No authority cited by defendant for the proposition that a motion argued and taken under submission may be re-noticed.= (501/REQ)
